title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What kind of sports or physical activities do you enjoy?
Is it easy to keep fit where you live?
Do you prefer team sports or individual ones? Why?
How important do you think it is to have an active lifestyle?
What sport would you most like to try that you haven't yet?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think children should be encouraged to play competitive sports from an early age?
What benefits do you think regular exercise has beyond physical health?
Should sport be compulsory in school? Why or why not?
